no-restricted-properties.message: Do not use hard waits. Wait for a specific condition (element state, API response) instead.

no-restricted-syntax.message: page.waitForTimeout() is banned. Use expect(locator).toBeVisible(), page.waitForResponse(), or other condition-based waits.
waitForLoadState('networkidle') is unreliable. Wait for a specific API response with page.waitForResponse() instead.
expect(await locator.textContent()) loses auto-retry. Use: await expect(locator).toHaveText()
expect(await locator.isVisible()) loses auto-retry. Use: await expect(locator).toBeVisible()
expect(await locator.innerText()) loses auto-retry. Use: await expect(locator).toHaveText() or .toContainText()
expect(await locator.inputValue()) loses auto-retry. Use: await expect(locator).toHaveValue()
expect(await locator.count()) loses auto-retry. Use: await expect(locator).toHaveCount()
Use test.fixme('reason') instead of test.skip() to track why tests are skipped.
